title: Assembly Elections 2026: 84.4% Voter Turnout Recorded in Assam Till 5 PM, 75% in Kerala, 86.9% in Puducherry
description: 2026 Phase 1 Election: A high-stakes battle is underway as Assam decides if the BJP can secure a historic third consecutive term, while Kerala enters a fierce three-way contest. Simultaneously, Puducherry polls will determine the future of all 30 Assembly seats.
